code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Infra_Ingress] --> CLOSED

    state CLOSED {Infra_Ingress] --> Normal
        Normal --> IncrementFailures: execute_trade fails
        IncrementFailures --> CheckThreshold: failure_count++
        CheckThreshold --> Normal: count < 3
        CheckThreshold --> [Infra_Worker]: count >= 3

        Normal --> ResetCount: execute_trade succeeds
        ResetCount --> Normal: failure_count = 0
    }

    CLOSED --> OPEN: Threshold Reached 3 failures

    state OPEN {Infra_Worker] --> BlockCalls
        BlockCalls --> CheckTimeout: All calls raise CircuitBreakerError
        CheckTimeout --> BlockCalls: elapsed < 60s
        CheckTimeout --> [Infra_Cache]: elapsed >= 60s
    }

    OPEN --> HALF_OPEN: Recovery Timeout Expired

    state HALF_OPEN {Infra_Ingress] --> TestRecovery
        TestRecovery --> EvaluateResult: Allow ONE test call
        EvaluateResult --> [Infra_Ingress]: Success
        EvaluateResult --> ReOpen: Failure

        ReOpen --> [Infra_Cache]
    }

    HALF_OPEN --> CLOSED: Test Call Succeeds
    HALF_OPEN --> OPEN: Test Call Fails

    style CLOSED fill:#4CAF50,stroke:#2E7D32,color:#fff
    style OPEN fill:#F44336,stroke:#C62828,color:#fff
    style HALF_OPEN fill:#FFC107,stroke:#F57C00,color:#333

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为熔断器设计一个状态图。核心场景是：当Infra_Ingress进来的交易连续失败达到阈值，就要切换到熔断状态，避免把压力传给下游的Infra_Worker。
明白。那CLOSED状态内部需要细化吗？比如正常处理路径和失败计数逻辑？
对，CLOSED里面要有Normal状态。每次execute_trade失败就进入IncrementFailures，计数加一，然后CheckThreshold判断。如果不到3次就回到Normal，满3次就触发熔断，跳转到OPEN状态。成功的话走ResetCount清零。
好的，CLOSED状态内部结构我画好了。现在处理OPEN状态：这时候所有调用都直接阻断，用BlockCalls节点，同时启动60秒超时检查？
没错，CheckTimeout如果不到60秒就维持在BlockCalls，超时满60秒就进入HALF_OPEN试探恢复。对了，OPEN状态超时后要借助Infra_Cache来过渡。
HALF_OPEN的设计我确认一下：只允许放一次测试调用，成功就回到CLOSED，失败重新熔断？
是的，TestRecovery允许ONE test call，然后EvaluateResult判断。成功返回Infra_Ingress，失败走ReOpen回到熔断，这里也要经过Infra_Cache。另外三个状态用颜色区分：CLOSED绿色、OPEN红色、HALF_OPEN黄色。
完成。状态流转都清楚了：CLOSED正常处理带失败计数，阈值到3转OPEN阻断，60秒超时转HALF_OPEN单探测试，成则闭、败则开。颜色也按你说的设了。
